name: ucc-mca-edge
description: Edge-native (Cloudflare Workers + D1 + KV + R2) foundation for the UCC-MCA Intelligence Platform. Self-contained strangler-pattern base; see ./README.md.

scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply ucc-mca --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply ucc-mca --env production
